allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('index.html', 'utf8'\); const scriptMatch = content.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(scriptMatch\) { try { new Function\(scriptMatch[1]\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('JS error:', e.message\); } }")
